title: Rocket League (Robotics Competition)
description: The IEEE DBIT team organized Rocket League, an innovative robotics competition held on 24 and 25 March 2026 under Colosseum 2026. The event combined gaming concepts with real-world robotics, where participants controlled Bluetooth-enabled RC cars in a football-style arena. With 22 participants competing in team-based matches, the competition emphasized teamwork, strategy, precision, and control under pressure. Participants gained hands-on experience with Arduino-based systems and wireless control, while engaging in an exciting and competitive environment that promoted technical learning through interactive gameplay.
